mapper.select: select * from season_factor where status = 1 and ( (start_date between #{start} and #{end}) or (end_date between #{start} and #{end}) or (start_date <= #{start} and end_date >= #{end}) or (year is null and ( (DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%m-%d') between DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%m-%d') and DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%m-%d')) or (DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%m-%d') between DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%m-%d') and DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%m-%d')) )) ) order by factor desc

select * from season_factor
name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by start_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into season_factor (name, start_date, end_date, factor, year, status) values (#{name}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{factor}, #{year}, #{status})
mapper.update: update season_factor set name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, factor = #{factor}, year = #{year}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from season_factor where status = 1 and start_date <= #{date} and end_date >= #{date} and (year = #{year} or year is null) order by case when year = #{year} then 1 -- 当年精确匹配优先 else 2 -- 固定节假日次之 end, factor desc
